about.title: CORNERSTONE Open Platform
about.subtitle: OPENSOURCE PDK live monitor
about.notes:
Licence free PDK monitoring and management dashboard.
First version designed by Dr. Emre Kaplan (beta release: 01/05/2026).
The portal is open to everyone for further development.

externalized.note: Uploaded items live as separate files under users/CS_Bilge/<section>/<bb>/. Each item carries `repoPath` instead of inline bytes; adopters hydrate via the fetch-time helper. Re-publish is idempotent — items already carrying a repoPath are skipped.
